summary: DOI verified valid — DOI 10.1029/2019JB017997 resolves to Pappa, Ebbing, Ferraccioli & van der Wal (2019), 'Modeling Satellite Gravity Gradient Data to Derive Density, Temperature, and Viscosity Structure of the Antarctic Lithosphere', JGR: Solid Earth 124(11). Confirmed via Wiley Online Library and NORA (NERC Open Research Archive). The WIN-067 detail_verdict_text citation lands on the correct paper. No replacement to Ferraccioli 2011 needed. Recommend close-as-verified-valid.
